recommendations.title: Very Good Girls
recommendations.overview: Two New York City girls make a pact to lose their virginity during their first summer out of high school. When they both fall for the same street artist, the friends find their connection tested for the first time.

recommendations.title: 18 Year Old Virgin
recommendations.overview: In a series of sexual mishaps, a high school senior tries to lose her virginity on the last night before graduation.

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.

recommendations.title: Harriet the Spy
recommendations.overview: When the secret notebook of a young girl who fancies herself a spy is found by her friends, her speculations make her very unpopular! Can she win her friends back?

recommendations.title: Porky's

recommendations.title: Good Kids
recommendations.overview: Four high school students look to redefine themselves after graduation.

recommendations.title: A History of Violence
recommendations.overview: An average family is thrust into the spotlight after the father commits a seemingly self-defense murder at his diner.

recommendations.title: Sweet Country
recommendations.overview: In 1929, an Australian Aboriginal stockman kills a white station owner in self-defense and goes on the lam, pursued by a posse.

recommendations.overview: When Ashtray moves to South Central L.A. to live with his father (who appears to be the same age he is) and grandmother (who likes to talk tough and smoke reefer), he falls in with his gang-banging cousin Loc Dog, who along with the requisite pistols

recommendations.title: Return to Nuke 'Em High Volume 1
